Meet Your Doctor

The Doctor Behind 30,000 Stone-Free Lives

Trusted by patients across India and abroad — for over 15 years of precision care

Dr. Deepanshu Gupta
Senior Urologist & Kidney Stone Specialist
★★★★★ 4.9 · 1,000+ Google Reviews
Available for Consultation · Gurugram & Delhi NCR
Dr. Deepanshu Gupta
MBBS  ·  MS (General Surgery), PGIMS Rohtak
MCh Urology, RML Hospital, New Delhi
🏆 MCh Urology — 1st Rank Holder, RML Hospital

Senior Urologist & Kidney Stone Specialist · Gurugram

Dr. Deepanshu Gupta is one of North India's most trusted urologists — known for his calm approach, precision surgeries, and genuine care for every patient. He pioneered Fluoroscopy-free Fans-RIRS in North India — treating kidney stones without a single cut, scar, or radiation. Patients from across India and abroad choose Dr. Gupta for his remarkable outcomes and approachable, family-doctor-like warmth.

Our Specialties

Center of Excellence for Kidney Stone Treatment

Specialised care across kidney stones, urology & gallbladder — all under one expert roof in Delhi NCR.

🔬
Kidney Stone Treatment

RIRS, ESWL, URSL, PCNL — tailored to stone size & location. India's first Fansa-RIRS pioneer.

Explore →
⚕️
Urology & Andrology

Expert diagnosis for prostate issues, UTIs, male sexual health and urological disorders.

Explore →
🫚
Gallbladder Stone Treatment

Laparoscopic cholecystectomy for gallbladder stones — minimally invasive, fast recovery, scarless procedure.

Explore →
Why RIRS?

The Gold Standard
in Stone Treatment

RIRS — Retrograde Intrarenal Surgery — is the most advanced kidney stone treatment available. A flexible ureteroscope reaches into the kidney through natural pathways. No cuts. No radiation. Discharged within 24 hours.

✂️
Zero Incisions
No cuts or stitches
☢️
Radiation-Free
Fluoroscopy-free RIRS
🏃
Discharge in 24 Hrs
Discharged within 24 hours
🎯
98% Success Rate
Proven clinical outcomes
Feature 🏆 RIRS ESWL PCNL
Incisions None None Small (key-hole)
Radiation None Yes Minimal
Stone-Free Rate 98% 60–70% 90–95%
Recovery 1–2 days 2–3 days 3–5 days
Anaesthesia Spinal None General / Spinal
Stone Size Up to 20mm Up to 10mm 20mm+
Scarring None None Minimal scar
Hospitalisation Day care Outpatient 2–4 days

Track Your Treatment

Compared to traditional shockwave therapy (ESWL) and PCNL, Fans-RIRS offers unmatched precision and safety.

Treatment Tracker

Digital Self-Assessment
Estimated Stone Size8 mm
Current Pain Level
Daily Water Intake1.5 Liters
I already had surgery (Recovery Mode)
Health Insight
MODERATE RISK
RIRS Laser Standard
Clinical Recommendation
Stones between 5–10mm have low chance of spontaneous passage. Fans-RIRS provides 98% clearance safely and without radiation.
43%
of 3.5L Goal
Hydration Status
CRITICAL: Dehydration risks stone growth and urinary infection.
Note: This tracker provides general guidance based on clinical standards. Always consult a urologist like Dr. Deepanshu Gupta for a formal diagnosis via ultrasound or CT scan.

💧 Health Tips
💧Stay Hydrated

Drink 3–3.5L of water daily to prevent stone formation and support recovery.

🥗Low Oxalate Diet

Reduce spinach, nuts, and chocolate. Increase calcium-rich foods in your diet.

🚶Stay Active

Light walking for 30 mins daily helps pass small stones and improves urinary flow.
